response.step_by_step_log: The video was reviewed and divided into three distinct segments: two dialogue scenes and one performance scene. The performance scene contained a song title "ULTRA C" and credits for Giga and TeddyLoid displayed on-screen. I simplified the artist name to "Giga and TeddyLoid" and used the search query '"ULTRA C" Giga Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics. The results confirmed the song and provided the necessary Japanese lyrics and their English translation. The dialogue scenes were identified as non-musical. All scenes were timed based on the video content.
response.global_summary: A short video featuring a dialogue skit, followed by a musical performance of "ULTRA C" by Anya Melfissa, IRyS, and Tsunomaki Watame, and ending with a final dialogue scene and comic transition.

scenes.description: Dialogue scene featuring Anya, IRyS, and Watame in a 3D environment.
Performance of "ULTRA C" by Anya Melfissa, IRyS, and Tsunomaki Watame. Song title and credits appear on-screen.
